entry.title: New: BILL062(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO AMENDMENTS TO BED AND BREAKFAST HOME AND TRANSIENT VACATION UNIT STANDARDS AND REQUIREMENTS INITIALLY MADE UNDER ORDINANCE 24-14, BUT INADVERTENTLY OMITTED UNDER ORDINANCE 25-2.

Amends ROH Section 21-5.70-3, as enacted by Ordinance 25-2, to make certain amendments relating to bed and breakfast home and transient vacation unit standards and requirements, initially made under Ordinance 24-14, but inadvertently omitted under Ordinance 25-2.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
